metadata.title: Oboya Horticulture | Soluções Integradas em Horticultura
metadata.description: Seu parceiro completo em horticultura. Soluções integradas da propagação e plantio à embalagem e exposição no varejo — atendendo produtores em todo o mundo.

nav.solutionsVegetablesDesc: Propagação, sistemas de cultivo e embalagem para produção de hortaliças.
nav.solutionsFlowersDesc: Soluções completas para floricultura e cultivo ornamental.
nav.solutionsFruitsDesc: Sistemas especializados para cultivo de frutas vermelhas e frutíferas.
nav.productsGrowingMediaDesc: Substratos e soluções de solo para saúde ideal das plantas.
nav.productsPackagingDesc: Embalagens prontas para o varejo de produtos frescos.
nav.productsEquipmentDesc: Carrinhos, bandejas e equipamentos para estufas.

hero.title: Seu parceiro completo em horticultura
hero.description: Soluções integradas da propagação e plantio à embalagem e exposição no varejo — confiadas por produtores em mais de 80 países.

companyOverview.headlineGreen: Apoiamos toda a cadeia de suprimentos hortícola
companyOverview.headlineWhite: da propagação e plantio à embalagem e exposição no varejo.

globalPresence.title: Atuamos em 25 países, com centros de produção na Ásia, América do Sul e Europa, além de equipes de suporte locais em todo o mundo.

featuredProducts.title: Soluções integradas de horticultura projetadas para eficiência, qualidade e sustentabilidade em toda a cadeia de suprimentos.

solutions.title: Sistemas completos para a horticultura moderna
solutions.description: Cada solução é projetada para integrar-se perfeitamente — do chão da estufa à exposição no varejo.
solutions.propagationDesc: Substratos, bandejas e sistemas climatizados para estabelecimento saudável das plantas.
solutions.packagingDesc: Embalagens prontas para o varejo e soluções logísticas que preservam a frescura da fazenda à prateleira.
solutions.sustainableDesc: Materiais e processos ecológicos que reduzem o impacto ambiental sem comprometer a qualidade.
solutions.distributionDesc: Infraestrutura logística global que garante entrega confiável aos locais de produção em todo o mundo.
solutions.circularDesc: Embalagens recicláveis e programas de redução de resíduos alinhados às certificações do setor.

industries.title: Atendendo cada segmento da horticultura moderna
industries.description: Expertise personalizada para os ambientes e culturas que definem sua operação.
industries.greenhousesDesc: Sistemas escaláveis para cultivo protegido em larga escala.
industries.nurseriesDesc: Ferramentas de precisão para produção de mudas jovens e enraizamento.
industries.retailDesc: Embalagens e logística que preservam a qualidade até a prateleira.
industries.berriesDesc: Soluções especializadas para operações de alto valor em frutas vermelhas.

innovation.title: Tecnologia pioneira e práticas sustentáveis que moldam o futuro da horticultura
innovation.description: De sistemas avançados de estufa a soluções de embalagem circular, investimos continuamente em P&D para ajudar produtores a enfrentar os desafios de amanhã.
innovation.news1Title: Tecnologia de estufa de nova geração para produção sustentável
innovation.news2Title: Expandindo nossa presença nos mercados da Ásia-Pacífico

sustainability.title: Cultivando com responsabilidade para as futuras gerações
sustainability.description: A sustentabilidade está incorporada em cada solução que entregamos — da composição do substrato ao design da embalagem e logística global.
sustainability.sourcingDesc: Materiais certificados e cadeias de suprimentos éticas em todas as operações.
sustainability.packagingDesc: Soluções recicláveis e reutilizáveis que reduzem a pegada ambiental.
sustainability.waterDesc: Sistemas projetados para otimizar a irrigação e reduzir o desperdício de recursos.
sustainability.carbonDesc: Compromisso em reduzir emissões na produção e logística.

history.title: Our history
history.p1: Founded as a regional horticulture supplier, Oboya has grown into a global partner supporting propagation, growing, packaging, and retail display.
history.p2: Today we operate across 25 countries with local teams, production hubs, and strategic partners serving growers worldwide.

mission.title: Mission, vision & values
mission.description: We help growers deliver quality, efficiency, and sustainability across the supply chain.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To be the most trusted integrated horticulture partner worldwide.

values.title: Values
values.description: Integrity, innovation, and sustainability guide every decision we make.

m1.description: Oboya begins as a regional horticulture supplier.

blog.title: Insights & news
blog.description: Trends, innovation, and stories from across the horticulture supply chain.

post1.title: Sustainable packaging trends in fresh produce
post1.excerpt: How retailers and growers are aligning packaging with circular economy goals.
post1.p1: Retailers are demanding packaging that protects product quality while reducing environmental impact.
post1.p2: Oboya partners with growers to pilot recyclable formats and optimize shelf presentation.
post1.p3: Early pilots show improved waste recovery without compromising freshness.

post2.title: Greenhouse innovation in 2026
post2.excerpt: Climate control, substrates, and logistics are converging in modern greenhouse design.
post2.p1: Integrated systems help growers manage humidity, irrigation, and crop cycles with greater precision.
post2.p2: Digital monitoring and modular equipment reduce downtime across large facilities.
post2.p3: The next wave of investment focuses on energy efficiency and automation.

post3.title: Berry category growth in retail
post3.excerpt: Packaging and display solutions supporting premium berry programs.
post3.p1: Berry sales continue to outperform broader produce categories in many markets.
post3.p2: Retail-ready packs and display trolleys improve visibility and reduce handling damage.
post3.p3: Localized assortments help chains tailor pack sizes to regional demand.

aboutV2.title: Nossa história ao longo do tempo
aboutV2.description: Role para girar pelos marcos que transformaram a Oboya em um parceiro global de horticultura.

caseStudies.title: Proven results worldwide
caseStudies.description: Selected projects demonstrating Oboya solutions across markets and crop types.

case1.title: Scaling greenhouse logistics in the Netherlands
case1.excerpt: A commercial greenhouse group needed consistent tray and trolley flows across sites.
case1.challenge: Inconsistent logistics hardware slowed transplanting and dispatch cycles.
case1.solution: Oboya standardized trolley formats and propagation trays across three facilities.
case1.result: Handling time dropped 18% and dispatch accuracy improved across peak season.

case2.title: Berry packaging program in Brazil
case2.excerpt: A berry exporter required retail-ready packs for multiple supermarket chains.
case2.challenge: Existing packs failed shelf-life targets for export programs.
case2.solution: Custom clamshell formats and palletization support were deployed with local partners.
case2.result: Waste claims fell 22% while maintaining premium shelf presentation.

case3.title: Distribution hub modernization in Mexico
case3.excerpt: A regional distributor needed faster replenishment for greenhouse clients.
case3.challenge: Fragmented inventory and long lead times affected grower planning.
case3.solution: Oboya implemented a hub-and-spoke model with localized SKU assortments.
case3.result: Average replenishment lead time improved from 11 to 6 days.

case4.title: Growing media supply in China
case4.excerpt: A nursery network sought consistent substrate quality across provinces.
case4.challenge: Variable substrate batches affected rooting uniformity.
case4.solution: Premium growing media blends were qualified and supplied through regional partners.
case4.result: Rooting consistency improved and rework rates declined across propagation lines.

faqsPage.intro: Find quick answers about products, logistics, quotations, and support.

q1.question: How do I know which products are available in my country?
q1.answer: Use the B2B shop to select your country and currency. Only available SKUs will be shown.

q2.question: Are catalogue products the same as shop products?
q2.answer: The PDF catalogue shows the full range. The shop filters items available in your market.

q3.question: Can I request samples?
q3.answer: Yes. Contact your local office or submit a quotation request with sample notes.

q1.question: Do you ship internationally?
q1.answer: Yes. Availability and lead times vary by product and destination.

q2.question: How are lead times estimated?
q2.answer: Your local sales team confirms lead times after quotation review.

q1.question: Does checkout process payment?
q1.answer: No. Checkout creates a quotation request for the local commercial team.

q2.question: What information should I include?
q2.answer: Company, country, contact details, quantities, and any project notes.

q3.question: How fast will I receive a response?
q3.answer: Most requests receive a response within two business days.

q1.question: How do I contact a specific office?
q1.answer: Use the interactive map on the homepage or the contact form with an office reference.

q2.question: Which languages are supported?
q2.answer: Our site is available in English, Portuguese, Spanish, and Chinese.

s1.title: 1. Acceptance of terms
s1.body: By accessing this website you agree to these terms and conditions. If you do not agree, please discontinue use of the site.

s2.title: 2. Use of content
s2.body: All content is provided for informational purposes. Product specifications, availability, and pricing may change without notice.

s3.title: 3. Intellectual property
s3.body: Trademarks, logos, text, images, and catalogue materials are owned by Oboya or its licensors and may not be reused without permission.

s4.title: 4. Limitation of liability
s4.body: Oboya is not liable for indirect damages arising from use of the website or reliance on estimated pricing shown in the B2B shop.

s5.title: 5. Contact
s5.body: For legal inquiries contact legal@oboya.example or your local Oboya office listed on the contact page.
